ddls:
CREATE TABLE "analysis_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis run */,
  "module" TEXT /* Name of the analysis module or tool used */,
  "sample" TEXT /* Name of the sample being analyzed */,
  "seqlen" TEXT /* Sequence length of the sample */,
  "ppn" INTEGER /* Number of processors used */,
  "mem" TEXT /* Memory allocated for the analysis */,
  "trial" INTEGER /* Trial number of the run */,
  "AvgRSS" INTEGER /* Average resident set size (RSS) in bytes */,
  "AvgSharedTxt" INTEGER /* Average shared text space in bytes */,
  "AvgStack" INTEGER /* Average stack size in bytes */,
  "AvgTotal" INTEGER /* Average total memory used in bytes */,
  "AvgUnsharedData" INTEGER /* Average unshared data size in bytes */,
  "CommandTimed" TEXT /* Command line used to run the analysis */,
  "ExitStatus" INTEGER /* Exit status of the analysis run */,
  "FileSysIn" INTEGER /* File system input operations */,
  "FileSysOut" INTEGER /* File system output operations */,
  "InvolCtxtSwitch" INTEGER /* Number of involuntary context switches */,
  "MajorFaults" INTEGER /* Number of major page faults */,
  "MaxRSS" INTEGER /* Maximum resident set size (MaxRSS) in bytes */,
  "MinorFaults" INTEGER /* Number of minor page faults */,
  "PageSize" INTEGER /* Page size in bytes */,
  "PercentCPU" REAL /* Percentage of CPU usage */,
  "SignalsDeliv" INTEGER /* Number of signals delivered */,
  "SocketMsgRecv" INTEGER /* Number of socket messages received */,
  "SocketMsgSent" INTEGER /* Number of socket messages sent */,
  "Swaps" INTEGER /* Number of swaps */,
  "SystemTime" REAL /* System time used in seconds */,
  "UserTime" REAL /* User time used in seconds */,
  "VolCtxtSwitch" INTEGER /* Number of voluntary context switches */,
  "WallTime" TEXT /* Wall clock time of the run in HH:MM:SS format */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the run belongs */,
  "script_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis script used */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the analysis run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the analysis run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, failed, running) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message or log if the run fails */,
  "resource_allocation" TEXT /* Details of resource allocation (e.g., cloud instance type, cluster name) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_runs_module FOREIGN KEY ("module") REFERENCES modules ("module_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_runs_sample FOREIGN KEY ("sample") REFERENCES samples ("sample_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the sample */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g., tissue, cell line) */,
  "sequence_length" TEXT /* Sequence length of the sample */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the sample belongs */,
  "sequencing_technology" TEXT /* Sequencing technology used */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sample */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the sample data is stored */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the sample file */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis module or tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "command_template" TEXT /* Template command for running the module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the module belongs */,
  "script_path" TEXT /* File path of the analysis script */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies required for the module to run */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing client */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_access_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES analysis_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
